name: Lyndon B. Johnson
title: Last known photo of Lyndon B. Johnson, taken in January 1973, about a week before his death from a heart attack.
description: Lyndon B. Johnson was photographed in January 1973, about a week before his death at his ranch in Stonewall, Texas. Johnson had suffered multiple heart attacks since leaving office in 1969, and had become visibly aged and frail. He continued to smoke heavily despite his doctors' warnings. On January 22, 1973, he called the Secret Service switchboard from his bedroom reporting chest pains. Agents found him on the floor of his bedroom and attempted CPR, but he was pronounced dead on arrival at Brooke Army Medical Center in San Antonio. He was 64 years old. He died just two days after Richard Nixon's second inauguration.
bio: Lyndon B. Johnson was the 36th President of the United States. He championed landmark legislation including the Civil Rights Act, the Voting Rights Act, and Medicare.
